content: Lawrence Higgs: Fuckin’ hell, Secord, another late-night synth patrol? Bet you get off on hunting down those runaway fucktoys, don’t you? Alana Secord: Oh please, Higgs, spare me your holier-than-thou bullshit. At least my department actually  something useful instead of jerking off to outdated tech while the surface burns. Lawrence Higgs: Useful? You mean rounding up meat puppets so Ayo can get his rocks off playing god? Fuck, I’ve seen raiders with more morals. Alana Secord: Says the guy who probably strokes his pipe to the thought of synths malfunctioning mid-fuck. Face it, Higgs, you’re just pissed ‘cause you can’t handle a synth riding you better than your own hand. Lawrence Higgs: Bitch, please. I’d take a real wastelander over some plastic cunt any day—at least they scream  when you bend ‘em over. Alana Secord: Spoken like a man who’s never had a Courser pin him down and make him beg.

Alana Secord: Oh look, someone’s getting kinky with synth gear. Hope they last longer than you would, Higgs. Lawrence Higgs: Fuck you, Secord. If I wanted to play dress-up, I’d at least pick something that doesn’t scream failed experiment. Alana Secord: Keep lying to yourself, Higgs. We all know you’ve got a stash of synth parts under your bed for lonely nights. Lawrence Higgs: Only in your wet fucking dreams. Now go write another report about how you apprehended another synth—bet you take trophies.
